attributes.description: Single deployment deep dive with replica availability, pod resource usage, container restart trends, and network I/O.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS names = VALUES(k8s.deployment.name)
| EVAL count = MV_COUNT(names),
       name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " deployments"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS names = VALUES(k8s.deployment.name)
| EVAL count = MV_COUNT(names),
       name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " deployments"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.deployment.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.deployment.name
| LIMIT 1

embeddableConfig.description: Click to view deployment logs (opens a new tab)

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL)
| STATS pod_cpu = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
        container_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS `CPU usage` = MAX(pod_cpu),
        `CPU limit` = SUM(container_limit)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(`CPU usage`),
        `CPU limit` = SUM(`CPU limit`)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `CPU usage`, `CPU limit`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL)
| STATS pod_cpu = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
        container_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS `CPU usage` = MAX(pod_cpu),
        `CPU limit` = SUM(container_limit)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(`CPU usage`),
        `CPU limit` = SUM(`CPU limit`)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `CPU usage`, `CPU limit`

embeddableConfig.description: Tracks CPU usage against configured CPU limits for each deployment over time.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs limit over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_per = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS available = SUM(avail_per),
        capacity = SUM(cap_per)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL `Volume usage` = capacity - available
| SORT timestamp ASC, `Volume usage` DESC
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `Volume usage`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_per = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS available = SUM(avail_per),
        capacity = SUM(cap_per)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL `Volume usage` = capacity - available
| SORT timestamp ASC, `Volume usage` DESC
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `Volume usage`

embeddableConfig.description: Total volume usage (capacity minus available) for the deployment over time.
embeddableConfig.title: Volume usage over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS limit_per = LAST(k8s.container.cpu_limit, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_limit = SUM(limit_per)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_limit, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS limit_per = LAST(k8s.container.cpu_limit, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_limit = SUM(limit_per)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_limit, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

embeddableConfig.description: Total CPU limit across all containers in the deployment (in cores)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS pod_last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(pod_last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", pod_last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS pod_util = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| STATS bucket_util = AVG(pod_util)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(bucket_util), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS pod_last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(pod_last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", pod_last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS pod_util = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.name
| STATS bucket_util = AVG(pod_util)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(bucket_util), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

embeddableConfig.description:
Last CPU limit utilization value for this deployment in the selected time range.

"Last value vs Avg" shows how the most recent reading compares to the time-range average.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS vol_last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(vol_last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", vol_last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS avail_per = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS avail = SUM(avail_per), cap = SUM(cap_per)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(
    cap > 0,
    1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(avail) / TO_DOUBLE(cap),
    NULL
  )
| WHERE bucket_util IS NOT NULL
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(bucket_util), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS vol_last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(vol_last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", vol_last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS avail_per = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
        cap_per = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| STATS avail = SUM(avail_per), cap = SUM(cap_per)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(
    cap > 0,
    1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(avail) / TO_DOUBLE(cap),
    NULL
  )
| WHERE bucket_util IS NOT NULL
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(bucket_util), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

embeddableConfig.description:
Last volume utilization value for this deployment in the selected time range.

"Last value vs Avg" shows how the most recent reading compares to the time-range average.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name != ""
| STATS cap_per = LAST(k8s.volume.capacity, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap_per)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total_cap) , 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name != ""
| STATS cap_per = LAST(k8s.volume.capacity, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap_per)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total_cap) , 2)
| KEEP total_gb

embeddableConfig.description: Total volume capacity across all pods and volumes in the deployment

  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL

    AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(pod_ws)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| SORT timestamp ASC, `Memory working set` DESC
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `Memory working set`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(pod_ws)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| SORT timestamp ASC, `Memory working set` DESC
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `Memory working set`

embeddableConfig.description: Total memory working set for the deployment over time.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `Pod Count`

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, `Pod Count`

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods in the deployment over time.
embeddableConfig.title: Pod count over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

embeddableConfig.description: Network throughput over time by direction (Network In / Network Out).
embeddableConfig.title: Network I/O

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, desired, available

  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)

    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS container_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
        k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
        k8s.deployment.name = MAX(k8s.deployment.name)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| STATS `Restarts` = SUM(container_restarts)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name
| WHERE `Restarts` > 0
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name, `Restarts`

  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),

  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name
| WHERE `Restarts` > 0
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.name, `Restarts`

embeddableConfig.description: Container restarts per pod over time. Only pods with restarts greater than zero are shown.
embeddableConfig.title: Container restarts by pod

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
| STATS
    phase_num      = MAX(k8s.pod.phase),
    cpu_usage      = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws      = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit_util = MAX(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization),
    restarts       = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name  = MAX(k8s.node.name),
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    last_seen      = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      phase_num == 5, "Unknown",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0)
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT restarts DESC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
| STATS
    phase_num      = MAX(k8s.pod.phase),
    cpu_usage      = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws      = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit_util = MAX(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization),
    restarts       = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name  = MAX(k8s.node.name),
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    last_seen      = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      phase_num == 5, "Unknown",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0)
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT restarts DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Pods in this deployment with phase, CPU, memory, restarts, and memory limit utilization. Drills down to Pod Detail.
embeddableConfig.title: Pods

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS pod_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS pod_count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of pods in the deployment.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND current_phase == 2
| STATS running_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND current_phase == 2
| STATS running_count = COUNT(*)
